resources.string: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed.

This request is separate from any other data privacy rights you may have given your residency. To see a full profile of your data control rights and additional actions you can take, please refer to our

If you delete your account, you\'ll lose access to it, in addition to any information associated with it - including watchlists, watch history, playhead positions, commenting, and other user generated content.\n\n
Account deletion is a privacy feature that gives you more control over your data. If you delete your account, you\'ll still be a subscribed Crunchyroll user.
Canceling your subscription is an additional step
.\n\nIf you want to unsubscribe from Crunchyroll and you signed up through the app, you can cancel your subscription through your Android device. If you subscribed a different way, please
You must cancel your subscription before deleting your account. If you have done so already, are you sure you want to delete your account?
To create an account please visit
We don\'t have videos for this artist yet. The good news? We\'re adding videos to our library every day.
You’ve got full access to our selection of games curated just for anime fans!
Subscribe to %1$s or %2$s to access premium, ad-free games!
Upgrade your subscription and access a selection of games created for anime fans!
Access Crunchyroll Game Vault with Mega Fan!
Enjoy anime-inspired games. Plus offline viewing, streaming on multiple devices, and more!
Enjoy stellar games, ad-free anime, and more on the Crunchyroll® app or website.
To sign up for %s, log in or create a new account first.
Your cancellation was successful. Your subscription will end within %s. Don’t worry, you can resubscribe anytime.
Need a break? You can also pause your subscription instead.
Pause for as long as you need
In order to cancel your subscription, you’ll have to go to the store and manually select the cancel option.
We’re Sad to See You Go!
Are You Sure You Want to Cancel?
New episodes shortly after airing in Japan
New episodes one hour after Japan
Unlimited access to the Crunchyroll library
Pay less by switching to a different plan and keep unlimited, ad-free access.
Stay with us to hear more about your favorite upcoming shows, movies, and amazing events.
New episodes same day as Japan
Crunchyroll Store discounts and exclusive gifts
We’d hate to see you leave behind all the benefits of being part of Crunchyroll Premium. Here are just some of the features you’ll lose access to when you cancel:
Can\'t log in on this device
Image displayed while the cast receiver is playing an ad
Current position is at the head of the live stream
Click on the button below to change the email address that’s used to sign in and receive Crunchyroll communications.
A secure link has been sent to your email. Allow up to 10 minutes for the email to appear.
Please check your inbox for a verification email or click the link below to have a new one sent.
Oops! Your Email Hasn’t Been Verified Yet.
This will permanently delete your entire History and reset your progress in all videos. This can’t be undone.
Clear Your History and Viewing Progress?
Cannot establish network connection.\nPlease try again later.
We have no updates.\nPlease check again later.
Sorry, your comment has not been deleted.
Are you sure? This action can’t be undone.
Please ensure you are connected to the internet and try again.
Do you want to discard your comment?
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
To troubleshoot, please contact Customer Support.
Pardon the anime interruption. We noticed you have a Crunchyroll account with the same email. Enter your Crunchyroll password to sync with your Funimation account.
To sign up for Crunchyroll subscriptions, visit %s
Save 16% by signing up for an annual plan and get everything in the Mega Fan subscription!
Enjoy the newest episodes of anime, no ads, and Offline Viewing on multiple devices!
Save 16% by signing up for an annual plan and get everything in the Mega Fan subscription!
Enjoy the newest episodes of anime, no ads, and Offline Viewing on multiple devices!
Enjoy the newest episodes of anime, no ads, and Offline Viewing on multiple devices!
Unlimited anime, no ads, and new episodes shortly after airing in Japan.
Unlimited anime, no ads, and new episodes as early as one hour after Japan.

Your membership, starting with a free trial period if eligible, will begin when you click %1$s. If eligible for a free trial, you will be charged %2$s plus any applicable taxes when your free trial ends; otherwise, you will be charged immediately when you begin your membership. Your membership will renew automatically unless you choose to cancel your membership through Google Play at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. By purchasing a membership you are agreeing to our %3$s and %4$s.

Your membership, starting with an introductory price period if eligible, will begin when you click %1$s. If eligible for an introductory price, you will be charged %2$s plus any applicable taxes when your introductory price ends; otherwise, you will be charged immediately when you begin your membership. Your membership will renew automatically unless you choose to cancel your membership through Google Play at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. By purchasing a membership you are agreeing to our %3$s and %4$s.
Enjoy the newest episodes of anime, all with NO ADS!
Enjoy the newest episodes of anime, all with NO ADS!
Enjoy the newest episodes of anime, all with NO ADS!
Enjoy the newest anime, no ads, and Offline Viewing on up to 6 devices, AND special offers!
Access Crunchyroll Game Vault, a catalog of free games
Unlimited access to the Crunchyroll library
Stream on one device at a time
Stream on up to 4 devices at a time
Stream on up to 6 devices at a time
Access to digital Manga (Manga is only available in English)
Access to Sony Music videos and concerts
Sync episodes and movies to watch offline
New episodes one hour after Japan
Simulcast the same day as Japan
Crunchyroll Store Deals: 10% off everyday; Members only offers & early access to select sales
Crunchyroll Store Deals: 15% off everyday; Members only offers & early access to select sales
Crunchyroll Store Deals: 20% off everyday; Members only offers & early access to select sales
Upgrading to %1$s through this particular device is available only to Fan Members who subscribed through Google Billing.
Next up, creating a password that’s at least 6 characters long.
Add to this Crunchylist by searching for a series or from an anime’s page.
Add to this Crunchylist by searching for a series or movie or from an anime’s page.
Are you sure you\'d like to delete this Crunchylist? It can\'t be undone.
Start typing in the search field to find a series to add to your Crunchylist.
Start typing in the search field to find a series\nor movie to add to your Crunchylist.
Need help? Start with our most %s.
You don\'t have any Crunchylists yet.\nLet\'s create one!
You don\'t have any Crunchylists yet.\nLet\'s create one!
This is suitable for all audiences.
This action is currently unavailable. Contact Customer Support to continue.
This content is not yet available for casting. Would you like to end your casting session and begin watching this video?
Go to your device\'s Settings to allow notifications
Linking your account will share what you are currently watching on Discord.
If you don’t want to share what you’re watching any longer, tap disconnect.
Are you sure you want to disconnect from your account on Discord?
Please verify you’d like to disable this setting.
Do not sell my personal information

This option stops the sharing of personal information with third parties for only this app on this device. This prevents personalized video ads and substitutes more generic video ads that are not determined based on your personal information. Note that enabling this feature will not change the presentation of ads nor the duration of ad breaks for non-Premium members. To learn more about how your data is shared and for more options, including ways to opt-out across other Sony Pictures Entertainment properties, please visit %1$s.
For California residents only pursuant to the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
Unable to save preference. Please ensure you are connected to the Internet and try again.
Upgrade to %1$s to use this feature.
Upgrade to %1$s to use this feature.
Download storage is full. Remove some downloads or apps from your device and try again.
Sync your favorite shows to\nwatch offline
Sync shows and movies to watch when\nyou\'re offline.
Upgrade to %1$s to use this feature.
Upgrade to %1$s or %2$s to use this feature.
I want all the latest Crunchyroll info, offers, and news. All communications are subject to our %1$s. Opt out anytime.
Finally, we need your email in case you can’t log in.
You will still need to enter an email address when creating an account.
Are you sure you want to leave?
I want all the latest Crunchyroll info, offers, and news.
Lastly, we need your email to help recover your account.
Click the link we just sent and you’re all done!
We sent a verification link to %s
Confirm your email to fully enjoy all the app’s features and keep your account safe.
Please confirm your email address to continue
Then you can fully enjoy Crunchyroll.
No results, but don\'t give up
You have reached the end of the feed.
We couldn’t add %1$s to your watchlist. Try again later.
Your device is not compatible with this functionality.
An error occurred fetching more search results
There was an issue getting more details about this ad
Invalid email address. Please use another one.
Invalid email address. Please use another one.
Invalid password. Please use another one.
Passwords must have at least %s characters and no spaces.
That phone number is invalid, double-check and try again.
That phone number is invalid, double-check and try again.
Account info invalid. Please try again.
You\'ve reached your attempt limits. Please try again later.
Username is unavailable. Here’s a suggestion!
We couldn’t remove %1$s from your watchlist. Try again later.
Continue watching on this device by stopping an existing stream linked to your account.
We love all your streams, but there\'s a limit.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Upgrade to %1$s to use this feature.
Upgrade to %1$s or %2$s to use this feature.
A link will be sent to your email address to reset your password if your account exists.
Check the exact error using adb logcat, searching for GlanceAppWidget
To access the Crunchyroll Help Page, please visit help.crunchyroll.com
Start watching to fill this feed.
A new version of our app is available.
We were unable to process your payment, so we couldn’t renew your subscription. Please update your payment information within %s to keep access to your Premium features.
Your subscription is going to be suspended
Due to a payment issue, we couldn’t renew your subscription. Please update your payment information within %s to keep access to your Premium features.

Due to a payment issue, we couldn’t renew your subscription. You’ve still got all of your Premium features. But you’ll need to update your payment information within the next %s to keep your membership active.
There was an issue with your account
You can always change your language preferences in your account settings.
Select your language preferences for watching. Feel free to change them anytime in your account settings.
At Last, Watch Anime Your Way!
But you can watch it in %1$s instead. Would you like to continue?
%1$s Dub is not available for the next episode
Media controls hidden, press d-pad to show
Welcome to Crunchyroll! To log in, you can use either Crunchyroll or Funimation credentials.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Please confirm that you are over 18 years old and would like to enable mature content.
Please confirm you are at least 18 years old and would like to enable mature content on your account.
View all content rated 10 and below
View all content rated 12 and below
View all content rated 14 and below
View all content rated 16 and below
View all content rated 18 and below
Only view content suitable for all audiences
Be Aware: You are using the same email address to pay for both Crunchyroll and Funimation.
Your watchlist and history are now ready. Sweet!
Choose wisely—you won’t be able to change your decision on your own after confirming—you will need to contact Customer Support.
Your Crunchyroll subscription remains active, and you have access to all Premium features.
Your Crunchyroll account has been created.
Your Crunchyroll account has been created. You now have Premium access to Crunchyroll due to your Funimation subscription.
From now on, use your Crunchyroll username and password to access your content on all Crunchyroll apps.
From now on, use your Crunchyroll credentials to access your content on all Crunchyroll apps.
You are about to access Crunchyroll for the first time with your Funimation credentials. To proceed, please agree with the Crunchyroll Terms and Privacy Policy.
I agree to Crunchyroll Terms and Privacy Policy and declare that I am at least 16 years old.
You now have Premium access to Crunchyroll due to your Funimation subscription. Now get ready to enjoy the world’s largest anime library with awesome perks!
Get Your Anime On Premium Style
Your Funimation watch data transfer is in progress.
Enjoy ad-free access to the entire Crunchyroll library anytime, anywhere—plus simulcasts straight from Japan.
Moving forward, please use your Funimation username and password to access your content on all Crunchyroll apps.
Moving forward, please use your Funimation credentials to access your content on all Crunchyroll apps.
Choose to either merge your Funimation Watchlist and History with Crunchyroll’s, replace it, or keep it as it is.
Choose to either merge your Funimation Watchlist and History with Crunchyroll’s, replace it, or keep it as it is.
Your Watchlist and History are on the way over. In the meantime, enjoy the world’s largest anime library!
Replace my Crunchyroll data with Funimation data
Welcome to Your New Anime Home!
With your current subscription, you’ll continue to have Premium access on all Crunchyroll platforms!
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this car
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this phone
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this tablet
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this tv
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this device
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this watch
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
This will be used for social features like commenting. Once you create your Username, you cannot change it. Choose wisely.
Feel free to edit your avatar, background and viewing preferences. You can even add an additional profile if you upgrade!
This is used for social features like commenting. This cannot be changed.
You have your very own profile!
We’ve created a profile just for you. You can customize it and even add more to your account. Do you want to see it now?
Dang! Crunchyroll is not available in \nyour country.
Video can’t be played. Syncing is not complete.
Only %1$s Members can play synced videos.
Only %1$s and %2$s Members can play synced videos.
Only %1$s Members can sync videos for offline viewing.
Only %1$s and %2$s Members can sync videos for offline viewing.
Due to a payment issue, we couldn’t renew your subscription, so it was automatically suspended. To prevent your membership from expiring, please update your payment info in the next 30 days.
To create an account please visit\ncrunchyroll.com/create-account
All your favorite anime. All in one place.
Check the code and try again.
Enter code from the SMS sent to
Enter the verification code we sent to
By creating an account you\'re agreeing to our %1$s & %2$s and are at least 16 years old.
You’re set! You can now log in using your phone number.
We couldn\'t change your password. Please try again.
Please enter your email address, and we\'ll send you a password reset link.
You don\'t have any new notifications.
We’ll send you a notification when we have something new to share!
Your preferred audio language for this episode is available only for Premium Members.
Get access to new episodes shortly after airing in Japan.
Get exclusive access to music videos and concerts performed by the hottest artists worldwide!
Sign up for Mega Fan to enjoy shows offline.
Get access to new episodes one hour after airing in Japan.
Upgrade to Premium to Watch Now
Content available only for Premium Members.
For this episode, %1$s is available only for Premium Members
To read the Crunchyroll Privacy Policy, please visit crunchyroll.com/privacy
To access the Redeem Promo Code Page, please visit %1$s
You recently canceled your subscription and will lose access to your Premium features within %s. But you can still renew your membership until then.
This video is not available in your current location.
This cannot be synced with your current Maturity Restrictions setting.
This cannot be viewed with your current Maturity Restrictions setting.
We did our best, but there were no results.
We\'ve sent your password reset email
Series has not been added to watchlist.
To manage your Funimation subscription, please visit your native subscription provider.
You now have Premium access to Crunchyroll due to your Funimation subscription.
Thanks for being a Crunchyroll member. You\'re awesome!
Show Mature Content has been turned on
Your session has expired. Please log in.
By logging in you\'re agreeing to our %1$s & %2$s and are at least 16 years old.
Please enter your mobile number to verify your account. Standard messaging rates may apply.
I want all the latest Crunchyroll info, offers, and news.
By creating an account you\'re agreeing to our %1$s & %2$s and are at least 16 years old.

Please enter your mobile number to create an account. By continuing, you agree to our %1$s & %2$s, are at least 16 years of age, and to receive automated texts to verify your identity. Standard messaging rates may apply.
We couldn\'t find any shows to recommend, so here are some of our most popular ones instead.
We couldn\'t find any suggestions, but we DO suggest you keep watching Crunchyroll.
We’re sorry, no shows are available\nin this season
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Currently \"Stream using Cellular\" is turned OFF, and the app is not connected to Wi-Fi. Would you like to turn \"Stream using Cellular\" ON? (Data rates may apply.)
Enjoy your Premium features and benefits!
Sync shows and movies to\nwatch when you\'re offline.
Currently “Sync using Cellular” is turned OFF, and the app is not connected to Wi-fi. Would you like to turn “Sync using Cellular” ON? (Data rates may apply.)
Takes the longest and uses the most storage.
Fastest option, using the least storage.
By creating an account you’re agreeing to our %1$s & %2$s and are at least 16 years old.
To read the Crunchyroll Terms of Service, please visit crunchyroll.com/tos
We have recently updated our Terms of Use that govern the use of our service. You can review the %1$s on the Crunchyroll website at %2$s.
Looks like you’ve got an old version of the app. Update now for the latest and greatest!
Upgrading through this particular device is available only to Fan Members who subscribed through Google Billing.
You won\'t be able to change your username after confirming so choose wisely! Your avatar can be changed at any time.
A new verification link has been sent. Allow up to 10 minutes for the email to appear.
This video is not available in your current location.
This video is no longer available for offline viewing.
Let\'s fill it up with awesome anime.
Sort by when stuff was added to your watchlist
The latest stuff added to Crunchyroll
Sort by when stuff was watched
Sort by recently added, updated, or watched
All your favorite anime. All in one place
Start watching to fill this feed.
